titleStmt.title: SII 26.423: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 423. (A.R. No. 402 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva II: Year 13, 127th day = 1145-46 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmēvu vaḷar tirupponmādupuṇara, etc. and mentions the queen Buvaṉamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records the gift, made by the king, and executed by Tribhuvaṉachakravartti Kōnēriṉmai-koṇḍān, of the village Aḍaṟpāḍi Mēyūr alias Nallāvūr in Kūḍal in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, yielding an income of 155(1/2) māḍai of money, as iṟaiyili dēvadāna for worship and services to be done by the servants of the deity and the superintendents of the temple affairs, to the god Mahādēvar Tiruppulippagavar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu. The name of the gift-village was changed into Śivapādaśekaranallūr. It is stated that this gift of the village with the money income therefrom was registered in the official records by Anapāya Mūvēndavēḷān, the tirumandira-vōlai. A certain Malaiyapparāyaṉ figures as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevuvaḷar tirupponmātu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vijayamāmakaḷ velpuyat tiruppa Icaiyin celviyum Eṇṭicaiy viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇilamaṭaṉtaiyait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar taruma maṇimuṭi kavittenat tirumuṭicūṭi mallai ñālattup palluḻikkellām Ellaiyilinpamika viniteta veṇ
kuṭainiḻaṟ kiḻc ceṅkolocci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻinaṭappac cempon virasiṁhāsanattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tripuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tribhuvaṉacakravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭān milāṭāna jananātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr mahā- devar ti
ruppulippakavar koyilil devakanmikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Ittevaṟku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka rājarājavaḷanāṭṭuk kūṭalilāpaṟpāṭi meyūrāṉa nallāvūr māṭai nūṟṟaimpattañcaraiyum patinmunṟāvatumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu paḻam peyar tavirntu civapātacekaranallūr Enum perāl variyiliṭṭu variyilārum varikku kūṟu ceyvār
kaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvaritarac connom Ivvūr Iṟukkum māṭai nūṟṟaimpattañcaraiyum patinmunṟāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Ākak kaikkoṇṭu Itteṟku veṇṭum nimantañ celuttuka Eḻutinān tirumantiraōlai Anpāya muventaveḷān Ivai malaiyapparāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 3 nāḷ 100 2 10 7 Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.423 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
